overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a white-haired character in a black cloak walking along a forest trail. The character approaches a small wooden shed, opens the door to look inside, then continues down the path through the sunlit woodland.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path through the forest toward a distant wooden shed

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail winding through the forest with patches of grass and small stones
tall trees with green foliage forming a dense canopy over the path
tall trees with green foliage lining the right side of the trail
small brown wooden shed with sloped roof visible in the distance down the path
tall green and golden grass growing alongside the dirt path
tall green and golden grass growing alongside the dirt path
pile of cut wooden logs stacked beside the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow dirt trail through a dense forest with tall deciduous trees and wild grass lining the path. A small wooden shed is visible ahead in the distance, growing larger as the character approaches. A stack of logs sits beside the path on the left.

events.description: character opens the wooden shed door and peers inside briefly

agents.ego_description: approaching the wooden shed, opening the door to look inside, then moving away to continue down the path

entered.detail: rustic wooden picket fence running alongside the path near the shed

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the small wooden shed surrounded by a rustic fence. The character opens the shed door and looks inside briefly before moving away. The surrounding trees give way to a small clearing around the structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail continuing past the shed

agents.ego_description: walking away from the shed and continuing down the forest path deeper into the woods

segments.scene_description: The character walks away from the wooden shed, leaving it behind as the trail continues through the dense forest. The path winds through tall trees and thick undergrowth with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy.

segments_errors: segment[0]: 首段 changed 应为空

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a forest trail that leads to a rustic structure before returning to the depths of the woodland. It begins with the character walking down a narrow dirt path lined with tall deciduous trees and wild grass, passing a stack of logs as a small wooden shed emerges in the distance. As the character reaches the shed, the dense forest opens into a small clearing where the character pauses to open the door and peer inside. The scene then shifts as the character moves away from the structure, leaving the clearing behind to re-enter the thick undergrowth. Finally, the camera follows the winding trail back into the dense canopy, where dappled sunlight filters through the towering trees.
